snippet.title: Har Har Mahadev 🔱 Nonstop Mahashivratri Songs | Namo Namo, BamBholle, Jaikal Mahakal, Kaun Hain Voh
snippet.description:
👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Zee Music Company - https://bit.ly/ZeeMusicCo 

Celebrate the divine night of Mahadev with this powerful Har Har Mahadev – Nonstop Mahashivratri Special Jukebox 🔱

Experience 2+ hours of pure Shiv bhakti featuring iconic tracks like Namo Namo, BamBholle, Jaikal Mahakal, Kaun Hain Voh, Shiv Tandav, Om Namah Shivaya, Har Har Shambhu Japa Karo, and many more devotional anthems dedicated to Lord Shiva.

snippet.title: 🔱पीछे बाराती आगे बैंड बाजा | गौरा खोल दरवाजा | Shiv Baraat Song 2026 | Maha Shivratri Special Bhajan
snippet.description:
#Shivratri #ShivBaraat #HarHarMahadev
महाशिवरात्रि की पावन बेला पर प्रस्तुत है शिव–पार्वती विवाह की दिव्य झांकी।
“पीछे बाराती आगे बैंड बाजा, गौरा खोल दरवाजा” – यह भजन भोलेनाथ की बारात की अद्भुत छवि प्रस्तुत करता है।

कैलाश से चली शिव की बारात, नंदी पर सवार महादेव, पीछे गणों की टोली, देवताओं की पुष्प वर्षा और द्वार पर खड़ी माता पार्वती…

इस पावन भजन को सुनकर आप भी बोल उठेंगे –
🙏 हर हर महादेव 🙏

यह भजन समर्पित है सभी शिव भक्तों को।
महाशिवरात्रि पर इस दिव्य विवाह का आनंद लें और अपने जीवन में शिव–शक्ति की कृपा प्राप्त करें।

अगर भजन पसंद आए तो:
👍 Like करें
🔔 Channel Subscribe करें
📢 Share जरूर करें

जय भोलेनाथ 🔱

shiv baraat song
maha shivratri bhajan 2026
piche barati aage band baja
gaura khol darwaza bhajan
shiv parvati vivah song
shivratri special bhajan
har har mahadev song
new shiv bhajan 2026
shiv shakti amar milan
bhole baba baraat

#Shivratri

localized.title: 🔱पीछे बाराती आगे बैंड बाजा | गौरा खोल दरवाजा | Shiv Baraat Song 2026 | Maha Shivratri Special Bhajan
localized.description:
#Shivratri #ShivBaraat #HarHarMahadev
महाशिवरात्रि की पावन बेला पर प्रस्तुत है शिव–पार्वती विवाह की दिव्य झांकी।
“पीछे बाराती आगे बैंड बाजा, गौरा खोल दरवाजा” – यह भजन भोलेनाथ की बारात की अद्भुत छवि प्रस्तुत करता है।

कैलाश से चली शिव की बारात, नंदी पर सवार महादेव, पीछे गणों की टोली, देवताओं की पुष्प वर्षा और द्वार पर खड़ी माता पार्वती…

इस पावन भजन को सुनकर आप भी बोल उठेंगे –
🙏 हर हर महादेव 🙏

यह भजन समर्पित है सभी शिव भक्तों को।
महाशिवरात्रि पर इस दिव्य विवाह का आनंद लें और अपने जीवन में शिव–शक्ति की कृपा प्राप्त करें।

अगर भजन पसंद आए तो:
👍 Like करें
🔔 Channel Subscribe करें
📢 Share जरूर करें

snippet.title: Gidha - R Nait (Official Video) | Himanshi Khurana | New Punjabi Bhangra Songs 2026
snippet.description:
Get ready for high-energy beats and pure Punjabi vibes! Presenting the official video of Gidha by R Nait, featuring the stunning Himanshi Khurana. Powered with electrifying Bhangra music by Qaistrax and grand visuals by Sardaar Films, this track is all set to rule weddings, parties & festivals.

If you loved emotional storytelling in Guitar Warga, now experience the powerful Bhangra side of R Nait with dhol beats, vibrant gidha performances and full Punjabi swag!

🎧 Listen on All Audio Platforms:

♪ iTunes: https://tinyurl.com/fw8bxhha 
♪ Spotify: https://tinyurl.com/mps2txvy  
♪ JioSaavn: https://tinyurl.com/2tmv934j 
♪ YouTube Music: https://tinyurl.com/2c6kj265 
♪ Amazon Music: https://tinyurl.com/558yvvm7 
♪Insta Audio:- https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/883914604121199/
⸻

🎶 Song Credits:

👉 Song: Gidha
👉 Singer / Lyricist / Composer: R Nait
👉 Featuring: Himanshi Khurana
👉 Music: Qaistrax
👉 Video: Sardaar Films
👉 Director: Jaspreet Singh
👉 Choreographer: Anoop Rai
👉 DOP: Jeet
👉 Edit & DI: Arshpreet
👉 Production: Param Pasula
👉 Project By: Satkaranvir Singh Khosa
👉 Conceived By: Virvinder Singh Kaku
👉 Digital Partner: Coin Digital Pvt. Ltd.

⸻

This song brings traditional Punjabi gidha vibes mixed with modern Bhangra production — perfect for wedding season 2026!

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#SpiderNoirOnPrime

snippet.title: Mahashivratri Special 2026 - भगवान शिव के 8 दिव्य मंत्र | शिव साधना | कर्पूर गौरम करुणावतारं
snippet.description:
Mahashivratri Special 2026 - भगवान शिव के 8 दिव्य मंत्र | शिव साधना | कर्पूर गौरम करुणावतारं

#bhajan #bhaktisagar #relaxing
#bhaktisagar #bhajan  #shiv  #relaxing  #shiva  #bollywood  #bholenath  #bhakti  #omnamahshivaya 


#omnamahshivaya  #Meditation #Om #meditation music
Welcome to this calming meditation session where we explore the power of chanting the sacred mantra "Om Namah Shivaya." This powerful mantra is not just a chant; it is a doorway to inner peace, healing, and spiritual transformation.

In this video, I guide you through the practice of chanting "Om Namah Shivaya," helping you connect with the divine energy of Lord Shiva, the source of creation and destruction. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced meditator, this practice is a simple yet profound way to quiet the mind, relax the body, and bring balance to your life.

Benefits of Chanting "Om Namah Shivaya":

Reduces stress and anxiety
Brings clarity and mental peace
Enhances spiritual connection
Promotes physical and emotional healing
Balances the mind, body, and soul
How to Practice:

Find a quiet and comfortable place.
Focus on your breath to relax and center yourself.
Chant "Om Namah Shivaya" along with your breath.
Visualize Lord Shiva or simply let the vibration of the mantra guide you inward.
Feel the calming effects as you continue chanting.
Chanting this mantra can help you align with your true self and experience deep meditation. Let this video be a reminder that peace is just a breath away.

Don't forget to LIKE, COMMENT, and SUBSCRIBE for more spiritual practices, meditation guides, and tips for a peaceful life.

snippet.title: CID Bahu | सी.आई.डी बहू | Official Trailer | Amrapali Dubey | New Bhojpuri Movie 2026
snippet.description:
Movie: CID Bahu
Star Cast: Amrapali Dubey, Shweta Verma, Rambha Sahani,  Ayaz Khan, Vidhya Singh, Raj Singh Rajpoot, Puja Thakur, Sahil Siddique And Other
Banner: Shreyash Films PVT
Music On: Enter 10 Rangeela
Producer: Prem Rai
Writer & Director: Ananjay Raghuraj 
Dialogue & Screenplay: Arbind Tiwari 
Co-Producer: Shaista Khan  
Music: Sajan Mishra & Om Jha  
Lyrics: Dharam Hindustani, Durgesh Bhatt
Cinematography: Venket Mahesh 
Editor: Gurjant Singh
Choreographer: M K Gupta (Joy) 
Art: Nazir Shaikh
Costume: Vidha-Vishnu 
Post Production: Audio Lab
Background Music: Aslam Surti
Executive Producer: Nihal Singh
D.I & VFX: Mohit Kumar 
Production Controller: Amarjeet Das
Assistant Director: Vivek Kumar 
Stills: Kuber
Design: Narsu

मूवी: सी.आई.डी बहू
स्टार कास्ट: आम्रपाली दुबे, श्वेता वर्मा, रंभा साहनी, अयाज़ खान, विद्या सिंह, राज सिंह राजपूत, पूजा ठाकुर, साहिल सिद्दीकी और अन्य
बैनर: श्रेयश फिल्म्स PVT
म्यूज़िक ऑन: एंटर 10 रंगीला
निर्माता: प्रेम राय
कथा और निर्देशक: अनंजय रघुराज
पटकथा व संवाद : अरबिंद तिवारी
सह निर्माता: शाइस्ता खान
संगीत: साजन मिश्रा और ओम झा
गीत: धरम हिंदुस्तानी, दुर्गेश भट्ट
छायांकन: वेंकेट महेश
संकलन: गुरजंत सिंह
नृत्य: एम के गुप्ता (जॉय)
कला: नज़ीर शेख
कॉस्ट्यूम: विधा-विष्णु
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन: ऑडियो लैब
पार्श्व संगीत: असलम सुरती
कार्यकारी निर्माता: निहाल सिंह
डी.आई. व  वी एफ एक्स : मोहित कुमार
निर्माण नियंत्रक: अमरजीत दास
सहायक निर्देशक: विवेक कुमार
स्टिल्स: कुबेर
डिज़ाईन: नर्सू

स्टार कास्ट: आम्रपाली दुबे, श्वेता वर्मा, रंभा साहनी, अयाज़ खान, विद्या सिंह, राज सिंह राजपूत, पूजा ठाकुर, साहिल सिद्दीकी और अन्य
बैनर: श्रेयश फिल्म्स PVT
म्यूज़िक ऑन: एंटर 10 रंगीला
निर्माता: प्रेम राय
कथा और निर्देशक: अनंजय रघुराज
पटकथा व संवाद : अरबिंद तिवारी

छायांकन: वेंकेट महेश

नृत्य: एम के गुप्ता (जॉय)
कला: नज़ीर शेख
कॉस्ट्यूम: विधा-विष्णु
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन: ऑडियो लैब
पार्श्व संगीत: असलम सुरती
कार्यकारी निर्माता: निहाल सिंह

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | ROUND 3 | Day 3
snippet.description:
Round 3 of BGIS 2026 begins, and the competition reaches a new level of intensity.

Only teams that proved their consistency and adaptability move forward to this stage. With fewer spots and higher pressure, every match demands precision, composure, and smart decision-making. Small margins now carry big consequences. Expect sharper gameplay, calculated risks, and moments that define the path ahead. This is where performances truly matter and momentum can shift in an instant.

snippet.title: Kadhal Reset Repeat - Official Teaser | Director Vijay | Harris Jayaraj | Madumkesh | Jiya Shankar
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Teaser of Kadhal Reset Repeat, directed by Director Vijay, with music composed by Harris Jayaraj.

Starring Madumkesh, Arjun Ashokan and Jiya Shankar, this romantic entertainer teases a refreshing love story packed with emotions, modern relationships, and soulful music. With Harris Jayaraj’s signature melodies and Director Vijay’s heartfelt storytelling, Kadhal Reset Repeat promises a beautiful cinematic experience for audiences.

KadhalResetRepeat - Official teaser is out now!

In cinemas from March 6th, 2026.

snippet.title: ಮಹಾ ಶಿವರಾತ್ರಿ ವಿಶೇಷ ಭಕ್ತಿ ಗೀತೆಗಳು | ಲಿಂಗಾಷ್ಟಕಂ | Maha Shivaratri Special Shiva Bhakti Songs Kannada
snippet.description:
ಮಹಾ ಶಿವರಾತ್ರಿ ವಿಶೇಷ ಭಕ್ತಿ ಗೀತೆಗಳು | ಲಿಂಗಾಷ್ಟಕಂ | Maha Shivaratri Special Shiva Bhakti Songs Kannada

Maha Shivaratri Special Shiva Bhakti Songs in Kannada including the powerful Lingashtakam are sacred hymns dedicated to Lord Shiva (Mahadeva).
Listening or chanting these devotional songs on the auspicious night of Maha Shivaratri removes sins, negative karma, and obstacles while bringing peace, protection, and spiritual awakening.

Devotees believe worshipping Lord Shiva on Shivaratri grants wish fulfillment, divine blessings, and immense spiritual merit.
Ideal for Shivaratri night vigil (Jaagaran), pooja, meditation, and deep spiritual practice.
Listen with devotion and receive the grace of Sri Mahadeva.

 
#MahaShivaratri #Lingashtakam #ShivaBhakti #KannadaBhaktiSongs #Mahadeva

Maha Shivaratri Special Shiva Bhakti Songs in Kannada including the powerful Lingashtakam are sacred hymns dedicated to Lord Shiva (Mahadeva).
Listening or chanting these devotional songs on the auspicious night of Maha Shivaratri removes sins, negative karma, and obstacles while bringing peace, protection, and spiritual awakening.

Devotees believe worshipping Lord Shiva on Shivaratri grants wish fulfillment, divine blessings, and immense spiritual merit.
Ideal for Shivaratri night vigil (Jaagaran), pooja, meditation, and deep spiritual practice.
Listen with devotion and receive the grace of Sri Mahadeva.

snippet.title: Untitled John Wick Game - Announce Trailer | PS5 Games
snippet.description:
Created in collaboration between Saber, Lionsgate, and franchise director Chad Stahelski, the new “Untitled John Wick Game” will feature an original script set in the John Wick timeline, expanding on the franchise’s intricate lore with familiar characters fans already know, as well as completely new ones. Saber’s design will be faithful to the unique style and signature elements of the series, including a distinct gun fu combat system, jaw-dropping camerawork, immersive driving experiences, and a variety of memorable environments, all crafted to make players feel like they are in a John Wick movie, playing the role of John Wick himself.

#ps5 #ps5games #stateofplay #johnwick 

May contain content inappropriate for children. Visit http://www.esrb.org for rating information.

snippet.title: Hey Bhagawan - Official Movie Trailer | Suhas, Shivani Nagaram, Naresh Vijaya Krishna & Sudarshan
snippet.description:
Watch the Hilarious and chaotic Not a Trailer Of "Hey Bhagawan" starring Suhas, Shivani Nagaram as the lead pair. The film is produced by Narendra Reddy under Trishul Visionary Studios. Directed by Gopi Atchara. Grand release by Bunny Vas and Vamsi Nandipati under BV works and Vamsi Nandipati Entertainments. In Cinemas on Feb 20th

Cast: Suhas, Shivani Nagaram, Naresh Vijaya Krishna, Sudarshan

Crew:
Banner: Trishul Visionary Studios
Producer: B.Narendra Reddy 
Writer & Director: Gopi Atchara
Music Director: Vivek Sagar
DOP: Mahi Reddy Pandugula
Editor: Viplav Nyshadam
Production Design: A.Ram Kumaar 
Executive Producer: S.Ramana Reddy
Costume Designer: Bharath Gandhi
Story: Shanmukha Prashanth
Dialogues: Midhun Shankar Reddy
DI & Sound mix: Annapurna Studios
Colorist: Vivek Anand
Sound Mix: Kannan Ganpat
VFX: Anilkumar Jooluri (DIGITAL WAR VFX)
Sound Design: Sai Maneendhar Reddy
Publicity Designer: Aesthetic Kunjamma
PRO: Maduri Madhu, Vamsi-Shekar
Marketing : Vishnu Thej Putta

Release by Bunny Vas and Vamsi Nandipati under BV works and Vamsi Nandipati Entertainments

Music on Zee Music Company

Connect with us  - 
https://www.youtube.com/c/zeemusicsouth
https://www.facebook.com/zeemusicsouth
https://twitter.com/zeemusicsouth

snippet.title: Unstable SMP: The LAW
snippet.description:
temu avengers

Unstable SMP: The LAW

Unstable SMP:
➜  ⁨@FlameFragsMC 
➜  @Spokeishere  
➜  @ParrotX2 
➜  ⁨@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @LettuceK @JadenMAN @minutetechmc @PrinceZam @MapiccMc @jumperwho @PurpledMC @Boosfer @Lomedy @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @TheobaldTheBird 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (bunch of the cool minecraft ost remixes!)
https://www.youtube.com/@nombra101 (FlameFrags themes!)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ): Run of Things - Lauf der Dinge https://youtu.be/V5mExzEKWs8 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Cycle - Zyklus https://youtu.be/5Xx4rNUey90 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Prophet (dialogue) https://youtu.be/nreMC82GPo4 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Phoenix https://youtu.be/cl-poVUU6_I by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): The Lonely Mountain - Der Einsame Berg https://youtu.be/4e1smtwtPSA by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Brave new World - Schöne neue Welt https://youtu.be/QRQ8_vFVQIU by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Black Light - Schwarzes Licht https://youtu.be/h6QIAw0duF0 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

we wa we wa

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (bunch of the cool minecraft ost remixes!)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: Gaura ji ko lene aaye Bholenath ji | Saje hai ambar saji hai dharti | Jeetu Sharma | Mahashiv Ratri
snippet.description:
#Mahashivratri2026 #Jeetusharma #Shivratrispecial 

Saje hai ambar saji hai dharti   
 saji puri akash ji
Gaura ji ko lene aye 
 mere bholenath ji  

Ghungat  me chanda si lage meri maiya parvati
Man mohak sa roop hai lage mere bholenath ki
Ghungat  me chanda si lage meri maiya parvati
Man mohak sa roop lage mere bholenath ki
Milan ki mangal ghadi hai ayi shakti shiv ke sath ji 
Gaura ji ko  lene aye mere bholenath ji


Saji hai kashi saji ujjaini
Saji puri kailash ji
Gaura ji ko lene aye mere bholenath ji

Thama  hath maa gaura ka mere bholenath ne
Bachan diya hai sath rahenge har mushkil halat me 
Thamaa  hath maa gaura ka mere bholenath ne
Bachan diya hai sath rahenge har mushkil halat me 
Milan ki mangal ghadi hai ayi shakti shiv ke sath ji 
Gaura ji ko lene aye mere bholenath ji

Saji  himachal saji himalay
Saji puri barat ji
Gaura ji ko lene aye mere bholenath ji

Sat fero se ajj banegi parvati bholenath ki
pushp ki barsha dev kare hai naman kare har bar ji  
Sat  fero se ajj banegi parvati bholenath ki
pushp ki barsha dev kare hai naman kare har bar ji  
Milan ki mangal ghadi hai ayi shakti shiv ke sath ji 
Gaura ji ko lene aye mere bholenath ji

Saje hai ambar saji hai dharti   
 saji puri akash ji
Gaura ji ko lene aye 
 mere bholenath ji

सजे है अंबर सजी है धरती
सजी पुरी आकाश जी
गौरा जी को लेने आए
मेरे भोलेनाथ जी

घुंघट में चंदा सी लागे मेरी मैया पार्वती
मन मोहक सा रूप है लागे मेरे भोलेनाथ की
घुंघट में चंदा सी लागे मेरी मैया पार्वती
मन मोहक सा रूप लागे मेरे भोलेनाथ की
मिलन की मंगल घड़ी है आई शक्ति शिव के साथ जी
गौरा जी को लेने आये मेरे भोलेनाथ जी

सजी है काशी सजी उज्जैनी
सजी पुरी कैलाश जी
गौरा जी को लेने आये मेरे भोलेनाथ जी

थामा हाथ मा गौरा का मेरे भोलेनाथ ने
बचन दिया है साथ रहेंगे हर मुश्किल हालत में
थामा हाथ मा गौरा का मेरे भोलेनाथ ने
बचन दिया है साथ रहेंगे हर मुश्किल हालत में
मिलन की मंगल घड़ी है आई शक्ति शिव के साथ जी
गौरा जी को लेने आये मेरे भोलेनाथ जी

सजी हिमाचल सजी हिमालय
सजी पुरी बरात जी
गौरा जी को लेने आये मेरे भोलेनाथ जी

सात फेरे से आज बनेगी पार्वती भोलेनाथ की
पुष्प की वर्षा देव करे है नमन करे हर बार जी
सात फेरे से आज बनेगी पार्वती भोलेनाथ की
पुष्प की वर्षा देव करे है नमन करे हर बार जी
मिलन की मंगल घड़ी है आई शक्ति शिव के साथ जी
गौरा जी को लेने आये मेरे भोलेनाथ जी

सजे है अंबर सजी है धरती
सजी पुरी आकाश जी
गौरा जी को लेने आए
मेरे भोलेनाथ जी

snippet.title: శివరాత్రి వేళ తప్పక పాటించాల్సిన పవిత్ర మంత్రం | Hara Om Namah Sivaya | Shiva Mantra | Shivaratri
snippet.description:
శివరాత్రి వేళ తప్పక పాటించాల్సిన పవిత్ర మంత్రం | Hara Om Namah Sivaya | Shiva Mantra | Shivaratri 

On the sacred occasion of Maha Shivaratri, chant the powerful and divine mantra “Hara Om Namah Shivaya” to receive Lord Shiva’s blessings. This holy Panchakshari mantra is believed to remove negativity, purify the soul, and bring peace, prosperity, and spiritual strength.

Listening to or chanting Om Namah Shivaya during Shivaratri night is highly auspicious. Devotees observe fasting, perform Abhishekam to the Shiva Lingam, and repeat this sacred Shiva mantra 108 times to seek divine grace.

This Shivaratri Special 2026 presentation is perfect for meditation, pooja, temple rituals, and night vigil (Jagaran). Play this powerful Shiva mantra daily to invite positivity and Lord Shiva’s protection into your life.

🔱 Har Har Mahadev
🙏 Om Namah Shivaya

Subscribe for more Shiva devotional songs, powerful mantras, and Telugu bhakti updates.

Ghat Rakheya Connection Cheatera De Naal

Hal Hoya Na Jo Saade Ik Phone Te Ni
Aesa Koi Masala hi Na, Masala hi Na
Jeda Sadeya Hattha Che Naio Chaleya Ni aesa Koi Asla Hi Na, Asla Hi Na.

G Wagon ‘n Che Geda Kaada Siteya Tu Shit Dita Dil Mithiye

Saada Mud Tou Sbha Pura Kbba Aa Te Tu Jma Khil jattiye

Teri Takni Kaleje Aaida Firgi
Joh phirdiyan phaliyaan Kude 
Kale Dil Na Jattan De Putt Rakhde Cara Panwe Kaliyan Kude

Kale Dil Na Jattan De Putt Rakhde Cara Panwe Kaliyan Kude

Bande Nasli Hi Team Vich Jachde
Ni Heeren Jeh Yrr Panwe Billo Thode Khat Ne
Jithe Per Chad Jande Bande Koli Chat Ne
Ni Othe Jake Adiyan pagaiyaan Tere Jatt Ne

Pata Laga Grewal Kende Utte Di Aa Chij Ni
Pind Aviana Sara Kar Dita Seel Ni
Dungi Sat Marda Takake Landa Reej Ni

Oh Lene Godyan Thale Ni Jede Karde Aa Deal Ni
Khar Mana Vich Rende Sap Palde 
Ni main Aakya Bathera Bade Chir To

Hath Jod De Ni Yaariyan Lai Vapsi Hath Chakya Rakne Jina Seer To
Oh Kutte Ponkde Pitha Utte Ponk Lende Ni

Aaina Salyan De Pake Rakhu Jatt Sangli
Leke weapon licensi Nhio Vair Pugde Aa
Asla Chahida Paka 2 Numberi
Leke weapon licensi Nhio Vair Pugde Aa
Asla Chahida Paka

Puri Power Patan De Vich Rakhda Ni Shonki Jatt Kodhi Panda Aa
Khushi Duggan Mare Chak Chak Ni
Lenda Aa Sawad jeonDa

Oh Hukam Te Chalda
Na Hukam Na Senda
Na Koi Fukri Kude

Ondi Cast Farari Jini Pai Aa Joh Bapu Kole Nugri Kude

Ondi Cast Farari Jini Pai Aa Joh Bapu Kole Nugri Kude

snippet.title: Satyam Shivam Sundaram - Lyrical | Lata Mangeshkar | Mahashivratri Special | Shiv Bhajan
snippet.description:
महाशिवरात्रि के पावन अवसर पर प्रस्तुत है “सत्यम शिवम सुंदरम” – लता मंगेशकर की मधुर और भावपूर्ण आवाज़ में एक अमर शिव भजन। इस लिरिकल प्रस्तुति में शिव भक्ति, आस्था और आध्यात्मिकता की सुंदर अनुभूति मिलती है। इस दिव्य भजन को सुनें और महादेव की भक्ति में लीन हो जाएं।

ईश्वर के ऐसे अनेक मधुर प्यारे भजन, मंत्र आरतियां सुनने के लिए सब्सक्राइब करें : https://www.youtube.com/SaregamaBhakti

snippet.title: 2026 महाशिवरात्रि व्रत कथा | शिव पार्वती विवाह कथा | शिवरात्रि व्रत कथा | Ds Pal, Shiv Vivah Katha
snippet.description:
▶Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/c/SonotekBhakti
2026 महाशिवरात्रि व्रत कथा | शिव पार्वती विवाह कथा | शिवरात्रि व्रत कथा | Ds Pal, Shiv Vivah Katha
#mahashivratrikatha2026 #mahashivratri2026 #महाशिवरात्रिव्रतकथा #shivvivahkatha2026 #shivparwativivah2026 #shivkatha #shivratrifullkatha2026 #shivparwatishadi

To Get Daily Bhajan Updates Join Our Whatsapp Channel : https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vag51SI4tRrlB52f791U

महाशिवरात्रि फाल्गुन कृष्ण चतुर्दशी को मनाया जाने वाला एक प्रमुख हिंदू त्योहार है, जो भगवान शिव और माता पार्वती के मिलन (विवाह), शिवजी के नीलकंठ बनने, और उनके तांडव द्वारा सृष्टि चक्र को दर्शाने के रूप में मनाया जाता है। यह आत्मिक जागरण, ध्यान और वैराग्य की रात है, जो साधकों के लिए स्थिरता और आध्यात्मिक उन्नति का प्रतीक है। 

महाशिवरात्रि मनाने के मुख्य कारण और कथाएं:
शिव-पार्वती विवाह: पौराणिक कथाओं के अनुसार, इस पवित्र रात को भगवान शिव और माता पार्वती का विवाह हुआ था, जिसे शिव-शक्ति के मिलन (पुरुष और प्रकृति) के रूप में मनाया जाता है।
नीलकंठ बनना (समुद्र मंथन): समुद्र मंथन के समय निकले विष (हलाहल) को शिवजी ने ग्रहण किया और उसे अपने गले में धारण किया, जिससे उनका गला नीला पड़ गया और वे 'नीलकंठ' कहलाए। इस रात को उनके द्वारा सृष्टि को बचाने के उपलक्ष्य में मनाया जाता है।
दिव्य प्रकाश (ज्योतिर्लिंग): माना जाता है कि इसी दिन भगवान शिव पहली बार शिवलिंग के रूप में प्रकट हुए थे, जो एक अनंत अग्नि स्तंभ के समान थे।
आध्यात्मिक और यौगिक महत्व: योग परंपरा के अनुसार, इस रात प्रकृति में ऊर्जा का विशेष प्रवाह होता है और साधक शिव के समान स्थिरता पाने के लिए पूरी रात जागकर ध्यान करते हैं।
सृष्टि का विनाश और पुनर्जन्म: शिवरात्रि को 'कालरात्रि' भी कहा जाता है, जब शिव अपने तांडव के द्वारा सृष्टि के दुखों और विकारों का अंत करते हैं, जिसे आध्यात्मिक रूप से भीतरी परिवर्तन का प्रतीक माना जाता है। 
यह त्यौहार बुराई पर अच्छाई, आत्म-संयम, और शिव की कृपा प्राप्त करने के लिए व्रत, पूजा और रात्रि जागरण के साथ मनाया जाता है।

महाशिवरात्रि फाल्गुन कृष्ण चतुर्दशी को मनाया जाने वाला एक प्रमुख हिंदू त्योहार है, जो भगवान शिव और माता पार्वती के मिलन (विवाह), शिवजी के नीलकंठ बनने, और उनके तांडव द्वारा सृष्टि चक्र को दर्शाने के रूप में मनाया जाता है। यह आत्मिक जागरण, ध्यान और वैराग्य की रात है, जो साधकों के लिए स्थिरता और आध्यात्मिक उन्नति का प्रतीक है। 

महाशिवरात्रि मनाने के मुख्य कारण और कथाएं:
शिव-पार्वती विवाह: पौराणिक कथाओं के अनुसार, इस पवित्र रात को भगवान शिव और माता पार्वती का विवाह हुआ था, जिसे शिव-शक्ति के मिलन (पुरुष और प्रकृति) के रूप में मनाया जाता है।
नीलकंठ बनना (समुद्र मंथन): समुद्र मंथन के समय निकले विष (हलाहल) को शिवजी ने ग्रहण किया और उसे अपने गले में धारण किया, जिससे उनका गला नीला पड़ गया और वे 'नीलकंठ' कहलाए। इस रात को उनके द्वारा सृष्टि को बचाने के उपलक्ष्य में मनाया जाता है।
दिव्य प्रकाश (ज्योतिर्लिंग): माना जाता है कि इसी दिन भगवान शिव पहली बार शिवलिंग के रूप में प्रकट हुए थे, जो एक अनंत अग्नि स्तंभ के समान थे।
आध्यात्मिक और यौगिक महत्व: योग परंपरा के अनुसार, इस रात प्रकृति में ऊर्जा का विशेष प्रवाह होता है और साधक शिव के समान स्थिरता पाने के लिए पूरी रात जागकर ध्यान करते हैं।
सृष्टि का विनाश और पुनर्जन्म: शिवरात्रि को 'कालरात्रि' भी कहा जाता है, जब शिव अपने तांडव के द्वारा सृष्टि के दुखों और विकारों का अंत करते हैं, जिसे आध्यात्मिक रूप से भीतरी परिवर्तन का प्रतीक माना जाता है। 
यह त्यौहार बुराई पर अच्छाई, आत्म-संयम, और शिव की कृपा प्राप्त करने के लिए व्रत, पूजा और रात्रि जागरण के साथ मनाया जाता है।

snippet.title: I GOT A SUPER CARS WORTH *$50,000,000* IN SUPER WHEEL SPIN 🤑 Forza Horizon 5 - LOGITECH G29
snippet.description:
REBUILDING an OLD LAMBORGHINI to FASTEST LAMBO EVER! 🔥 - Forza Horizon 5 | LOGITECH G29

What happens when you take a forgotten, beat-up Lamborghini and transform it into an absolute speed monster? In this Forza Horizon 5 build, we're doing the IMPOSSIBLE! 🚀

Watch as we take a neglected Lamborghini from the junkyard, completely rebuild it, tune every component, and push it beyond its limits to create what might just be the FASTEST Lamborghini ever built in Forza Horizon 5! All played with the Logitech G29 steering wheel for the ultimate sim racing experience

snippet.title: Tandavam - Live in Dubai | Rishab Rikhiram Sharma | Mahashivratri Special [OUT NOW!]
snippet.description:
Tandavam — the cosmic pulse of Mahadev. 🔱

Also known as The Shiv Tandav Stotram, this sacred hymn attributed to Ravana glorifies Lord Shiva’s cosmic dance — symbolising creation, preservation and destruction. Across 16 powerful rhythmic verses, it paints a vivid portrait of Shiva: matted locks flowing with the Ganga, serpents adorning his neck, ash-smeared divinity, the crescent moon, and the thunderous resonance of the damaru.

This performance at Coca-Cola Arena, Dubai, in the presence of 15,000 people, was my offering of 4 of these 16 verses — a moment where devotion met magnitude.

Verse 1:
Jatatavigalajjala pravahapavitasthale
Galeavalambya lambitam bhujangatungamalikam
Damad damad damaddama ninadavadamarvayam
Chakara chandtandavam tanotu nah shivah shivam

With his neck consecrated by the flow of water that flows from his hair,
And on his neck a snake, which is hung like a garland,
And the Damaru drum that emits the sound "Damat Damat Damat Damat",
Lord Shiva did the auspicious dance of Tandava. May he give prosperity to all of us.

Verse 2:
Jata kata hasambhrama bhramanilimpanirjhari
Vilolavichivalarai virajamanamurdhani
Dhagadhagadhagajjva lalalata pattapavake
Kishora chandrashekhare ratih pratikshanam mama

I have a deep interest in Shiva
Whose head is glorified by the rows of moving waves of the celestial Ganga river,
Which stir in the deep well of his hair in tangled locks.
Who has the brilliant fire burning on the surface of his forehead,
And who has the crescent moon as a jewel on his head.

Verse 3:
Dharadharendrana ndinivilasabandhubandhura
Sphuradigantasantati pramodamanamanase
Krupakatakshadhorani nirudhadurdharapadi
Kvachidigambare manovinodametuvastuni

May my mind seek happiness in Lord Shiva,
In whose mind all the living beings of the glorious universe exist,
Who is the companion of Parvati (daughter of the mountain king),
Who controls unsurpassed adversity with his compassionate gaze, Which is all-pervading
And who wears the Heavens as his raiment.

Verse 4:
Jata bhujan gapingala sphuratphanamaniprabha
Kadambakunkuma dravapralipta digvadhumukhe
Madandha sindhu rasphuratvagutariyamedure
Mano vinodamadbhutam bibhartu bhutabhartari

Through rhythm, movement and sound, this was not just choreography, it was invocation.

Chanting the Shiv Tandav Stotram is believed to bestow strength, clarity, mental peace and spiritual liberation. Performing it on a stage of this scale was a reminder that devotion does not diminish in grand spaces — it expands.

This is Tāṇḍavam.
This is surrender.
This is Shiva.

Har Har Mahadev. 🔱

— Rishab*

#ShivTandav #Tandavam #Mahadev #LiveAtCCA #Dubai #IndianClassical #SpiritualMusic

Jatatavigalajjala pravahapavitasthale
Galeavalambya lambitam bhujangatungamalikam
Damad damad damaddama ninadavadamarvayam
Chakara chandtandavam tanotu nah shivah shivam

With his neck consecrated by the flow of water that flows from his hair,
And on his neck a snake, which is hung like a garland,
And the Damaru drum that emits the sound "Damat Damat Damat Damat",
Lord Shiva did the auspicious dance of Tandava. May he give prosperity to all of us.

Verse 2:
Jata kata hasambhrama bhramanilimpanirjhari
Vilolavichivalarai virajamanamurdhani
Dhagadhagadhagajjva lalalata pattapavake
Kishora chandrashekhare ratih pratikshanam mama

I have a deep interest in Shiva
Whose head is glorified by the rows of moving waves of the celestial Ganga river,
Which stir in the deep well of his hair in tangled locks.
Who has the brilliant fire burning on the surface of his forehead,
And who has the crescent moon as a jewel on his head.

Verse 3:
Dharadharendrana ndinivilasabandhubandhura
Sphuradigantasantati pramodamanamanase
Krupakatakshadhorani nirudhadurdharapadi
Kvachidigambare manovinodametuvastuni

May my mind seek happiness in Lord Shiva,
In whose mind all the living beings of the glorious universe exist,
Who is the companion of Parvati (daughter of the mountain king),
Who controls unsurpassed adversity with his compassionate gaze, Which is all-pervading
And who wears the Heavens as his raiment.

Verse 4:
Jata bhujan gapingala sphuratphanamaniprabha
Kadambakunkuma dravapralipta digvadhumukhe
Madandha sindhu rasphuratvagutariyamedure
Mano vinodamadbhutam bibhartu bhutabhartari

Through rhythm, movement and sound, this was not just choreography, it was invocation.

Chanting the Shiv Tandav Stotram is believed to bestow strength, clarity, mental peace and spiritual liberation. Performing it on a stage of this scale was a reminder that devotion does not diminish in grand spaces — it expands.

This is Tāṇḍavam.
This is surrender.
This is Shiva.

Har Har Mahadev. 🔱

— Rishab*

#ShivTandav #Tandavam #Mahadev #LiveAtCCA #Dubai #IndianClassical #SpiritualMusic

Experience the divine power of Lord Shiva with these sacred Shivaratri Bhakti Songs and Lingashtakam 🔱🕉️

Maha Shivaratri is the most powerful night to worship Lord Shiva. Listening to Shivayya Patalu and chanting Shiva stotrams on this holy day helps remove sins, overcome obstacles, and bring divine protection 🙏✨

Lingashtakam is a highly powerful prayer that pleases Mahadev and blesses devotees with peace, success, good health, and spiritual growth 🌸 It fills your home with positive energy and divine vibrations.

Let this Shivaratri bring new hope, inner peace, and Lord Shiva’s blessings into your life 🌙

🕉️ Om Namah Shivaya
🔱 Hara Hara Mahadeva
🙏 May Lord Shiva bless everyone

Listen and feel the divine presence of Mahadev in your heart ❤️

snippet.title: Machar ko leke bapuji Hogaye bhide pe ghussa! | FULL MOVIE | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Step into Jethalal’s world with Gada Electronics!  Manage the shop, tackle quirky customers, and experience nonstop TMKOC-style fun. 

Are you ready for the challenge? 
Play now: https://gadaelectronics.page.link/dhgB  
#GadaElectronics #TMKOCGame

Watch the FULL MOVIE of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzSk2_rPKNCDcjNAA8vaDN-E&si=rC5AotwLD2r3MHna

Click here to watch NEW Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzSxhJ6UCi6tgujD-FsAy0sw

Click here to watch your favourite videos from Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta', is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' and a mischievous son 'Tapu'. Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalal' to call his father 'Champaklal' from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Nitish Bhaluni / Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu)
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Sachin Shroff / Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Sunayana Fozdar / Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Jheel Mehta / Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani / Khushi Mali as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu)
Gurucharan Singh / Balwinder Singh Suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal / Monaz Mevawala as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Samay Shah as Gurucharan Singh Roshan Singh Sodhi (Gogi)
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah / Dharmit Turakhia as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Kuldeep Gor as Ratan Binjola
Dharti Bhatt as Rupa Baditop Binjola
Akshaan Sehrawat as Veer
Maahi Bhadra as Bansari
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku
Ghanshyam Nayak / Kiran Bhatt as Nattu Kaka
Tanmay Vekaria as Bagha
Navina Wadekar / Monika Bhadoriya as Bawri
Daya Shankar Pandey as Chalu Pandey
Rakesh Bedi as Taarak's Boss
Mayur Vakani as Sundarlal
Kanti Joshi as Baka

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani

Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/tmkoc_ntf

en-IN.title: Machar ko leke bapuji Hogaye bhide pe ghussa! | FULL MOVIE | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
en-IN.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Step into Jethalal’s world with Gada Electronics!  Manage the shop, tackle quirky customers, and experience nonstop TMKOC-style fun. 

Are you ready for the challenge? 
Play now: https://gadaelectronics.page.link/dhgB  
#GadaElectronics #TMKOCGame

Watch the FULL MOVIE of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzSk2_rPKNCDcjNAA8vaDN-E&si=rC5AotwLD2r3MHna

Click here to watch NEW Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzSxhJ6UCi6tgujD-FsAy0sw

Click here to watch your favourite videos from Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta', is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' and a mischievous son 'Tapu'. Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalal' to call his father 'Champaklal' from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

snippet.title: शिव विवाह-चले गौरा बिहाने | Lakhbir Singh Lakha | Mahashivratri Special Shiv Bhajan | Shivratri Song
snippet.description:
शिव विवाह-चले गौरा बिहाने | Lakhbir Singh Lakha | Mahashivratri Special Shiv Bhajan | Shivratri Song
देवाधिदेव महादेव भगवान शिव और माता पार्वती जी के विवाह की अदभुद लीला का आनंद ले . आप सभी भक्त लखबीर सिंह लक्खा जी की आवाज़ और चंद्रा - सूर्या के संगीत एवं 
चंद्रा प्रकाश के द्वारा लिखे इस  भक्ति से सराबोर शिव भजन को सुन कर आनंदित हों. भोलेनाथ की कृपा आप सभी पर बनी रहे 🙏हर हर महादेव 🙏

                    https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/755276080394927?igsh=bzR3ZnExZXRpYmVm

                    https://youtube.com/source/Xtn_W6-2yb0/shorts?feature=shared

➟ Location : Sundaram Resort

☛All © Reserved to Affection Music Records 

“शिव विवाह” 
========
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
करके नंदीसवारी देखो लागे भोले की छवि न्यारीहै 
मेरे भोले की बारात में सब मिले 
ब्रह्म विष्णु सहित सुर असुर भी चले 
नाचे ठुमक ठुमक गिरधारी चढ़ी क्या खुमारी है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
                    ****
जरा धीरे चलो मोरे बाराती भइया -२
थोड़ा सा नाचें सभी ता ता थैया 
धरती गगन सारी श्रृष्टि है झूमें 
होके मगन नाग किन्नर भी घूमें 
जरा भोले के चेहरे को देखो लालिमा छाई है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
                ****
द्वारे पे पहुंचे जो बारात लेके 
सारे जनाती आँखें फाड़ के देखें 
कईसन है दूल्हा मिला तुमको गौरा 
तन पे ना कपड़ा कोई ढंग का पहिरा 
वहाँ कईसे रहेगी महारानी चिंता ये हमारी है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
             ****
सखियाँ कहें कईसे रस्में निभाऊँ 
जूता ना पईरन मा अब का चुराऊँ 
सारी उम्मीदो पे पानी है फेरा 
अब कईसे लुंगी वो था हक जो मेरा 
ख़ुश रहो सदा मेरी प्यारी दुआ ये हमारी है
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
           ****
बाबुल की लेके चली है दुआयें 
माता मैना रो रो लेती बालाएं 
करके बिदाई चले भोले शंकर 
खुशियां ही खुशियां हैं मन में वो भरकर 
तीनो लोकों ने गायी बधाई खिली फुलवारी है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं

hi.description:
शिव विवाह-चले गौरा बिहाने | Lakhbir Singh Lakha | Mahashivratri Special Shiv Bhajan | Shivratri Song
देवाधिदेव महादेव भगवान शिव और माता पार्वती जी के विवाह की अदभुद लीला का आनंद ले . आप सभी भक्त लखबीर सिंह लक्खा जी की आवाज़ और चंद्रा - सूर्या के संगीत एवं 
चंद्रा प्रकाश के द्वारा लिखे इस  भक्ति से सराबोर शिव भजन को सुन कर आनंदित हों. भोलेनाथ की कृपा आप सभी पर बनी रहे 🙏हर हर महादेव 🙏

“शिव विवाह” 
========
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
करके नंदीसवारी देखो लागे भोले की छवि न्यारीहै 
मेरे भोले की बारात में सब मिले 
ब्रह्म विष्णु सहित सुर असुर भी चले 
नाचे ठुमक ठुमक गिरधारी चढ़ी क्या खुमारी है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
                    ****
जरा धीरे चलो मोरे बाराती भइया -२
थोड़ा सा नाचें सभी ता ता थैया 
धरती गगन सारी श्रृष्टि है झूमें 
होके मगन नाग किन्नर भी घूमें 
जरा भोले के चेहरे को देखो लालिमा छाई है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
                ****
द्वारे पे पहुंचे जो बारात लेके 
सारे जनाती आँखें फाड़ के देखें 
कईसन है दूल्हा मिला तुमको गौरा 
तन पे ना कपड़ा कोई ढंग का पहिरा 
वहाँ कईसे रहेगी महारानी चिंता ये हमारी है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
             ****
सखियाँ कहें कईसे रस्में निभाऊँ 
जूता ना पईरन मा अब का चुराऊँ 
सारी उम्मीदो पे पानी है फेरा 
अब कईसे लुंगी वो था हक जो मेरा 
ख़ुश रहो सदा मेरी प्यारी दुआ ये हमारी है
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
           ****
बाबुल की लेके चली है दुआयें 
माता मैना रो रो लेती बालाएं 
करके बिदाई चले भोले शंकर 
खुशियां ही खुशियां हैं मन में वो भरकर 
तीनो लोकों ने गायी बधाई खिली फुलवारी है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं

snippet.title: KATTALAN -MAJAKO MALLIKA (MAL)-Lyrical | Cubes Entertainments | B.Ajaneesh | Pepe | Sunil | Dushara
snippet.description:
Presenting “Majako Mallika” (Malayalam Lyrical Video) from Kattalan, starring Antony Varghese, Dushara Vijayan, Sunil, Kabir Singh etc
Composed by B. Ajaneesh Loknath, this vibrant track blends energetic rhythms with catchy lyrics, bringing the film’s festive vibe to life.

Directed by Paul George and producer by Shareef Muhammed in Cubes Entertainments Banner. Featuring powerful visuals and musical storytelling, Majako Mallika is set to become a chartbuster among music lovers.

snippet.title: Karua Tel | Ashish Yadav New Song | Srishti Bharti |Raksha Gupta | New Bhojpuri Song | Bhojpuri Gana
snippet.description:
आशिष यादव का नया धमाकेदार भोजपुरी गाना “करुआ तेल” प्रस्तुत है, जिसमें श्रीष्टी भारती की मधुर आवाज़ और रक्षागुप्ता की शानदार अदाकारी देखने को मिलती है। जबरदस्त म्यूजिक और देसी अंदाज़ से सजा यह गीत पूरी तरह मनोरंजन से भरपूर है। नया भोजपुरी गाना पसंद करने वालों के लिए खास पेशकश।

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Credits:-

Song Name - Karua Tel
Singer - Aashish Yadav & Srishti Bharti
Music - Pappu Bhai
Lyrics - Chintu Raja
Feat - Raksha Gupta
Composer - Nandan Yadav
Recording - Govind Vidyarthi
Video - Aashish Park
DOP - Rajesh Rathore & Vikash
Editor - Parkash
DI - Rohit Singh Mumbai

snippet.title: Om Namah Shivaya | महाशिवरात्रि स्पेशल ॐ नमः शिवाय धुन | Peaceful Mahashivratri Special Shiv Dhun
snippet.description:
​ ⁨@SonaSpiritual⁩  
______________________
Om Namah Shivaya | Mahashivratri Special Om Namah Shivaya Chant | Peaceful Mahashivratri Special Shiv Dhun
ॐ नमः शिवाय | महाशिवरात्रि स्पेशल ॐ नमः शिवाय धुन | शांत महाशिवरात्रि शिव धुन
ॐ नमः शिवाय | महाशिवरात्रि विशेष ॐ नमः शिवाय धुन | शान्त महाशिवरात्रि शिव धुन
ওঁ নমঃ শিবায় | মহাশিবরাত্রি বিশেষ ওঁ নমঃ শিবায় ধুন | শান্ত মহাশিবরাত্রি শিব ধুন
ଓଁ ନମଃ ଶିବାୟ | ମହାଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବିଶେଷ ଓଁ ନମଃ ଶିବାୟ ଧୁନ | ଶାନ୍ତ ମହାଶିବରାତ୍ରି ଶିବ ଧୁନ
ಓಂ ನಮಃ ಶಿವಾಯ | ಮಹಾಶಿವರಾತ್ರಿ ವಿಶೇಷ ಓಂ ನಮಃ ಶಿವಾಯ ಧುನ | ಶಾಂತ ಮಹಾಶಿವರಾತ್ರಿ ಶಿವ ಧುನ
ஓம் நம சிவாய | மகாசிவராத்திரி சிறப்பு ஓம் நம சிவாய துன் | அமைதியான மகாசிவராத்திரி சிவ துன்
ఓం నమః శివాయ | మహా శివరాత్రి ప్రత్యేక ఓం నమః శివాయ ధున్ | శాంతమైన మహా శివరాత్రి శివ ధున్
ഓം നമഃ ശിവായ | മഹാശിവരാത്രി പ്രത്യേക ഓം നമഃ ശിവായ ധുന്‍ | ശാന്തമായ മഹാശിവരാത്രി ശിവ ധുന്‍
ਓਂ ਨਮਹ ਸ਼ਿਵਾਯ | ਮਹਾ ਸ਼ਿਵਰਾਤਰੀ ਵਿਸ਼ੇਸ਼ ਓਂ ਨਮਹ ਸ਼ਿਵਾਯ ਧੁਨ | ਸ਼ਾਂਤ ਮਹਾ ਸ਼ਿਵਰਾਤਰੀ ਸ਼ਿਵ ਧੁਨ
ઓં નમઃ શિવાય | મહાશિવરાત્રી વિશેષ ઓં નમઃ શિવાય ધૂન | શાંત મહાશિવરાત્રી શિવ ધૂન
اوم نمہ شیوائے | مہاشِو راتری خاص اوم نمہ شیوائے دھن | پُرسکون مہاشِو راتری شیو دھن
______________________
Om Namah Shivaya ek शांत और शक्तिशाली शिव धुन hai jo मन को शांति, ध्यान और सकारात्मक ऊर्जा देती है।
यह भजन पूजा, योग और मेडिटेशन के लिए बहुत उपयुक्त है।

रामेश्वराय – श्री राम के आराध्य देव
गंगाधराय – जो गंगा को अपने मस्तक पर धारण करते हैं
जटाधराय – जिनकी जटाएँ हैं
सोमेश्वराय – चंद्रमा के स्वामी
विश्वेश्वराय – पूरे ब्रह्मांड के ईश्वर
महाकलेश्वराय – काल (समय) से भी महान
त्र्यम्बकेश्वराय – तीन नेत्रों वाले
योगेश्वराय – योग के अधिपति
Rameshwaraya – Lord of Rama
Gangadharaya – The one who holds the river Ganga
Jatadharaya – The one with matted hair
Someshwaraya – Lord of the Moon
Vishweshwaraya – Lord of the Universe
Mahakaleshwaraya – The Great Lord beyond time
Tryambakeshwaraya – The three-eyed Lord
Yogeshwaraya – The master of Yoga
______________________

localized.title: Om Namah Shivaya | महाशिवरात्रि स्पेशल ॐ नमः शिवाय धुन | Peaceful Mahashivratri Special Shiv Dhun
localized.description:
​ ⁨@SonaSpiritual⁩  
______________________
Om Namah Shivaya | Mahashivratri Special Om Namah Shivaya Chant | Peaceful Mahashivratri Special Shiv Dhun
ॐ नमः शिवाय | महाशिवरात्रि स्पेशल ॐ नमः शिवाय धुन | शांत महाशिवरात्रि शिव धुन
ॐ नमः शिवाय | महाशिवरात्रि विशेष ॐ नमः शिवाय धुन | शान्त महाशिवरात्रि शिव धुन
ওঁ নমঃ শিবায় | মহাশিবরাত্রি বিশেষ ওঁ নমঃ শিবায় ধুন | শান্ত মহাশিবরাত্রি শিব ধুন
ଓଁ ନମଃ ଶିବାୟ | ମହାଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବିଶେଷ ଓଁ ନମଃ ଶିବାୟ ଧୁନ | ଶାନ୍ତ ମହାଶିବରାତ୍ରି ଶିବ ଧୁନ
ಓಂ ನಮಃ ಶಿವಾಯ | ಮಹಾಶಿವರಾತ್ರಿ ವಿಶೇಷ ಓಂ ನಮಃ ಶಿವಾಯ ಧುನ | ಶಾಂತ ಮಹಾಶಿವರಾತ್ರಿ ಶಿವ ಧುನ
ஓம் நம சிவாய | மகாசிவராத்திரி சிறப்பு ஓம் நம சிவாய துன் | அமைதியான மகாசிவராத்திரி சிவ துன்
ఓం నమః శివాయ | మహా శివరాత్రి ప్రత్యేక ఓం నమః శివాయ ధున్ | శాంతమైన మహా శివరాత్రి శివ ధున్
ഓം നമഃ ശിവായ | മഹാശിവരാത്രി പ്രത്യേക ഓം നമഃ ശിവായ ധുന്‍ | ശാന്തമായ മഹാശിവരാത്രി ശിവ ധുന്‍
ਓਂ ਨਮਹ ਸ਼ਿਵਾਯ | ਮਹਾ ਸ਼ਿਵਰਾਤਰੀ ਵਿਸ਼ੇਸ਼ ਓਂ ਨਮਹ ਸ਼ਿਵਾਯ ਧੁਨ | ਸ਼ਾਂਤ ਮਹਾ ਸ਼ਿਵਰਾਤਰੀ ਸ਼ਿਵ ਧੁਨ
ઓં નમઃ શિવાય | મહાશિવરાત્રી વિશેષ ઓં નમઃ શિવાય ધૂન | શાંત મહાશિવરાત્રી શિવ ધૂન
اوم نمہ شیوائے | مہاشِو راتری خاص اوم نمہ شیوائے دھن | پُرسکون مہاشِو راتری شیو دھن
______________________
Om Namah Shivaya ek शांत और शक्तिशाली शिव धुन hai jo मन को शांति, ध्यान और सकारात्मक ऊर्जा देती है।
यह भजन पूजा, योग और मेडिटेशन के लिए बहुत उपयुक्त है।

रामेश्वराय – श्री राम के आराध्य देव
गंगाधराय – जो गंगा को अपने मस्तक पर धारण करते हैं
जटाधराय – जिनकी जटाएँ हैं
सोमेश्वराय – चंद्रमा के स्वामी
विश्वेश्वराय – पूरे ब्रह्मांड के ईश्वर
महाकलेश्वराय – काल (समय) से भी महान
त्र्यम्बकेश्वराय – तीन नेत्रों वाले
योगेश्वराय – योग के अधिपति
Rameshwaraya – Lord of Rama
Gangadharaya – The one who holds the river Ganga
Jatadharaya – The one with matted hair
Someshwaraya – Lord of the Moon
Vishweshwaraya – Lord of the Universe
Mahakaleshwaraya – The Great Lord beyond time
Tryambakeshwaraya – The three-eyed Lord
Yogeshwaraya – The master of Yoga
______________________

snippet.title: Shiv Ki Barat | शहनाज़ अख्तर का नया शिवरात्रि भजन 2026 | Shivratri Special Bhajan 2026
snippet.description:
🙏 हर हर महादेव 🙏

सुनिए शहनाज़ अख्तर का नया शिवरात्रि स्पेशल भजन 2026 – “शिव की बारात”। यह लेटेस्ट हिंदी शिव भजन भगवान भोलेनाथ की दिव्य बारात, शिव-पार्वती विवाह और महादेव की महिमा का अद्भुत वर्णन करता है।

Shiv Ki Barat | शहनाज़ अख्तर का नया शिवरात्रि भजन 2026 | Shivratri Special Bhajan 2026

अगर आप खोज रहे हैं:
नया शिव भजन 2026, महाशिवरात्रि स्पेशल भजन, शहनाज़ अख्तर का शिव भजन, शिव की बारात भजन, भोलेनाथ के भजन, हर हर महादेव गीत, शिव पार्वती विवाह भजन — तो यह भजन आपके लिए है।

इस महाशिवरात्रि पर सुनिए यह सुपरहिट शिव भक्ति गीत और पाएं शिव कृपा, सकारात्मक ऊर्जा और आध्यात्मिक शांति।

Title - शिव की बारात 
Singer - Shahnaaz Akhtar 
Lyrics - Dinesh Dave (Indore)
Composition - Shyam Chanchalani (Indore)
Music Arrangement and Programming - Prateek Shrivastava
Rhythem Arrangement - Jatin Birha (Anshu)
Recorded At - Shahnaaz Akhtar Studio
Mix And Mastering - Prateek Shrivastava
Digital Management - Always Digi Media
(www.alwaysdigimedia.com)


नया शिव भजन, शिवरात्रि 2026 भजन, शहनाज़ अख्तर न्यू भजन, लेटेस्ट शिव भक्ति गीत, भोले बाबा के भजन, महादेव सॉन्ग हिंदी, Shiv Ki Barat Bhajan, Shahnaz Akhtar Shiv Bhajan, Mahashivratri Special Song

👉 वीडियो को लाइक करें
👉 कमेंट में लिखें “हर हर महादेव”
👉 चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें लेटेस्ट भजनों के लिए

आप सभी को महाशिवरात्रि की शुभकामनाएँ।
🔱 जय भोलेनाथ 🔱

#शिवकीबारात #शहनाज़अख्तर #महाशिवरात्रि #ShivBhajan #Shivratri2026 #Bholenath #HarHarMahadev #LatestBhajan #HindiBhajan #trendingbhajan

snippet.title: Maha Siba Ratri Mahima | ମହା ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ମହିମା | ବ୍ରତ ମଧ୍ୟେ ଶ୍ରେଷ୍ଠ ଜାଗର ରାତି | Namita Agrawal
snippet.description:
ଓମ୍ ନମଃ ଶିବାୟ! 🙏 ସମସ୍ତ ବ୍ରତ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଶ୍ରେଷ୍ଠ ହେଉଛି ଜାଗର ବ୍ରତ ବା ମହାଶିବରାତ୍ରି। ଏହି ପବିତ୍ର ରାତିର ମହିମା ଅପାର। କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ନମିତା ଅଗ୍ରୱାଲ୍ ଙ୍କ ଭକ୍ତିଭରା ସ୍ୱରରେ ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ ପ୍ରଭୁ ମହାଦେବଙ୍କ ମହିମା ଏବଂ ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତର ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱ।

ଶିବରାତ୍ରି କେବଳ ଏକ ପର୍ବ ନୁହେଁ, ଏହା ହେଉଛି ଆତ୍ମଶୁଦ୍ଧି ଓ ଶିବଙ୍କ ସହ ମିଳନର ଏକ ପବିତ୍ର ତିଥି। ଏହି ଭିଡିଓ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଆପଣ ଜାଣିବାକୁ ପାଇବେ:

ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତର ପୌରାଣିକ ମହତ୍ୱ।
କାହିଁକି ଏହି ରାତିକୁ 'ବ୍ରତ ମଧ୍ୟେ ଶ୍ରେଷ୍ଠ' କୁହାଯାଏ?
ଜାଗର ଦୀପ ଜାଳିବାର ମହିମା।

#MahaShivaRatri #JagarMahima #NamitaAgrawal #OdiaPurana #MahaSibaRatri2026 #Jagaran #Mahadev #OmNamahShivaya #SidharthMusic #OdiaDevotional #ShivaRatriStory

ଓମ୍ ନମଃ ଶିବାୟ! 🙏 ସମସ୍ତ ବ୍ରତ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଶ୍ରେଷ୍ଠ ହେଉଛି ଜାଗର ବ୍ରତ ବା ମହାଶିବରାତ୍ରି। ଏହି ପବିତ୍ର ରାତିର ମହିମା ଅପାର। କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ନମିତା ଅଗ୍ରୱାଲ୍ ଙ୍କ ଭକ୍ତିଭରା ସ୍ୱରରେ ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ ପ୍ରଭୁ ମହାଦେବଙ୍କ ମହିମା ଏବଂ ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତର ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱ।

ଶିବରାତ୍ରି କେବଳ ଏକ ପର୍ବ ନୁହେଁ, ଏହା ହେଉଛି ଆତ୍ମଶୁଦ୍ଧି ଓ ଶିବଙ୍କ ସହ ମିଳନର ଏକ ପବିତ୍ର ତିଥି। ଏହି ଭିଡିଓ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଆପଣ ଜାଣିବାକୁ ପାଇବେ:

ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତର ପୌରାଣିକ ମହତ୍ୱ।
କାହିଁକି ଏହି ରାତିକୁ 'ବ୍ରତ ମଧ୍ୟେ ଶ୍ରେଷ୍ଠ' କୁହାଯାଏ?
ଜାଗର ଦୀପ ଜାଳିବାର ମହିମା।

#MahaShivaRatri #JagarMahima #NamitaAgrawal #OdiaPurana #MahaSibaRatri2026 #Jagaran #Mahadev #OmNamahShivaya #SidharthMusic #OdiaDevotional #ShivaRatriStory

snippet.title: महाशिवरात्रि स्पेशल | मेरे तन में भी शिव मेरे मन में भी शिव | Mere Tan Mein Bhi || Shivratri Special
snippet.description:
महाशिवरात्रि स्पेशल | मेरे तन में भी शिव मेरे मन में भी शिव | Mere Tan Mein Bhi || Shivratri Special
महाशिवरात्रि स्पेशल | मेरे तन में भी शिव मेरे मन में भी शिव | Mere Tan Mein Bhi || Shivratri Special

महाशिवरात्रि 2026 के पावन अवसर पर हम आपके लिए लेकर आए हैं एक दिव्य और मनमोहक भजन "मेरे तन में भी शिव मेरे मन में भी शिव"। यह भजन आपके मन को शांति देगा और आपको महादेव की भक्ति में लीन कर देगा।
भगवान शिव के चरणों में अपना ध्यान लगायें और इस महाशिवरात्रि स्पेशल भजन का आनंद लें। अगर आपको यह भजन पसंद आए तो वीडियो को लाइक करें और अपने मित्रों व परिवार के साथ शेयर ज़रूर करें।
भजन के बोल:

BHAJAN - Mere Tan Mein Bhi Shiv  

मेरे तन में भी शिव, मेरे मन में भी शिव
हर श्वास-श्वास में बसें महादेव शिव...  

Topics Covered:
• महाशिवरात्रि स्पेशल भजन 2026
• मेरे तन में भी शिव मेरे मन में भी शिव भजन
• Latest Shivratri Songs 2026
• Peaceful Lord Shiva Devotional Songs

snippet.title: SPIDER MAN against RUMI on Motorcycle in RAINBOW SPIDERS BRIDGE - GTA MULTIVERSE???
snippet.description:
SPIDER MAN against RUMI on Motorcycle in RAINBOW SPIDERS BRIDGE - GTA MULTIVERSE???
Welcome back to Grand GTA! 🚀🔥

In today’s epic GTA 5 stunt race challenge, the track turns into total chaos! Superheroes and fan-favorite characters battle across a crazy custom map packed with sharp turns, giant jumps, curved bridges, and wild obstacles.

Racers push their limits on motorcycles, cars, boats, quad bikes, and helicopters, switching vehicles as the challenge gets harder and faster. Every second counts.

But there’s one big rule — DON’T FALL.
Because under the map, the hungry SPIDER SHARK is waiting in the water for anyone who slips! 🦈

Fast moves, colorful visuals, insane moments, and nonstop action — this is classic Grand GTA stunt madness.
Watch till the end and choose your favorite racer!

snippet.title: Franklin Touch Anything Turns Into Diamond | GTA 5 Telugu
snippet.description:
Franklin gets publicly insulted at a party and leaves in anger. Moments later a mysterious place changes everything.
Franklin comes back with an unbelievable ability, Anything he touches turns into diamond.
With Lester’s mastermind plans and Trevor’s fearless support, destroyed cars become priceless treasures.
In one night, they go from normal life to unstoppable wealth.

Disclaimer:
All events, characters, and actions shown in this video are fictional and scripted for entertainment purposes only.
This video is based on a video game and does not promote real-life activities.
All gameplay footage belongs to Rockstar Games.

snippet.title: Shiba Ratri Brata Katha | ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତ କଥା | Namita Agrawal | Jagara Mahima Katha 🙏
snippet.description:
ଓମ୍ ନମଃ ଶିବାୟ! 🙏 ସମସ୍ତ ବ୍ରତ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଶ୍ରେଷ୍ଠ ହେଉଛି ମହାଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତ। କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ନମିତା ଅଗ୍ରୱାଲଙ୍କ ଶୁଦ୍ଧ ଓ ସୁମଧୁର କଣ୍ଠ ସ୍ୱରରେ ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ 'ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତ କଥା' ଏବଂ ଏହାର ଅପାର ମହିମା।

ଜାଗର ରାତିରେ ପ୍ରଭୁ ମହାଦେବଙ୍କ ପାଖରେ ଦୀପ ଜାଳି ଏହି ବ୍ରତ କଥା ଶ୍ରବଣ କଲେ କୋଟି ପୁଣ୍ୟ ପ୍ରାପ୍ତି ହୁଏ। ଏହି ଭିଡିଓରେ ଆପଣ ଜାଣିବାକୁ ପାଇବେ:

ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତ କାହିଁକି ପାଳନ କରାଯାଏ?
ବ୍ୟାଧ ଓ ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତର ପୌରାଣିକ କାହାଣୀ।
ଜାଗର ରାତିର ଆଧ୍ୟାତ୍ମିକ ମହତ୍ତ୍ୱ ଓ ପୂଜା ବିଧି।

Topic: Shiba Ratri Brata Katha (ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତ କଥା)
Singer: Namita Agrawal
Music Label: Sidharth Music / Sidharth Bhakti
Category: Odia Purana / Devotional Katha

#ShivaRatriBrataKatha #JagaraMahima #NamitaAgrawal #OdiaPurana #MahaShivaratri2026 #JagaraKatha #SidharthMusic #OdiaDevotional #ShivaPurana #JayJagannath #HarHarMahadev

snippet.description:

#MahaShivaratri2026 #Lingashtakam #LingashtakamKannada #ShivaratriSpecial #ShivaDevotionalSongs #OmNamahShivaya #KannadaBhaktiSongs 

Maha Shivaratri 2026 Special – Listen to the powerful Lingashtakam In Kannada and experience divine blessings of Lord Shiva. This sacred stotram is one of the most powerful Shiva devotional hymns, especially on Maha Shivaratri 

Celebrate Maha Shivaratri 2026 with devotion and chant Om Namah Shivaya to receive Lord Shiva’s divine blessings.

🔱 Om Namah Shivaya 🔱

𝙽𝚘𝚝 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚜𝚝𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚙𝚛𝚘𝚟𝚒𝚜𝚒𝚘𝚗𝚜 𝚘𝚏 𝚜𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝟷𝟶𝟼 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝟷𝟶𝟼𝙰, 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙵𝙰𝙸𝚁 𝚄𝚂𝙴 𝚘𝚏 𝚊 𝚌𝚘𝚙𝚢𝚛𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚠𝚘𝚛𝚔, 𝚒𝚗𝚌𝚕𝚞𝚍𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚜𝚞𝚌𝚑 𝚞𝚜𝚎 𝚋𝚢 𝚛𝚎𝚙𝚛𝚘𝚍𝚞𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚒𝚗 𝚌𝚘𝚙𝚒𝚎𝚜 𝚘𝚛 𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚛𝚍𝚜 𝚘𝚛 𝚋𝚢 𝚊𝚗𝚢 𝚘𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚖𝚎𝚊𝚗𝚜 𝚜𝚙𝚎𝚌𝚒𝚏𝚒𝚎𝚍 𝚋𝚢 𝚝𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚜𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗, 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚙𝚞𝚛𝚙𝚘𝚜𝚎𝚜 𝚜𝚞𝚌𝚑 𝚊𝚜 𝚛𝚎𝚟𝚒𝚎𝚠, 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚝 𝚒𝚜 𝚗𝚘𝚝 𝚊𝚗 𝚒𝚗𝚏𝚛𝚒𝚗𝚐𝚎𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚝 𝚘𝚏 𝚌𝚘𝚙𝚢𝚛𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝.

हो कैसे आऊ मिलवे बजेंगे कंगना 
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

snippet.title: Shiv Tandav Stotram | Shankar Mahadevan | रावण रचित शिव तांडव स्तोत्र | Mahashivratri Special 2026
snippet.description:
Times Music Spiritual presents ‘Shiv Tandav Stotram’, a powerful and sacred Shiv song traditionally written by Ravana, & sung by Shankar Mahadevan. This Shiv tandav composition praises the strength of Lord Shiva. With powerful Sanskrit verses & Shankar Mahadevan’s dynamic vocals, the Shiv stotram captures the intensity of Shiva’s Tandav - the celestial dance of creation & destruction.

According to legend, Ravana, the great devotee of Lord Shiva, composed the Shiv Tandav Stotram to praise Mahadev after trying to lift Mount Kailash. Impressed by his devotion and dedication, Lord Shiva blessed him with immense power and wisdom.

The importance of Shiv Tandav Stotram lies in its spiritual vibrations & powerful meaning. Chanting or listening to it is believed to remove fear, negative energy, and obstacles while bringing confidence, mental strength, and inner stability. It energizes the mind, improves focus, and fills devotees with courage. Check out the song now & immerse yourself in the divine energy of Bholenath. Har Har Mahadev! 🔱

#ShivTandav #ShankarMahadevan #ShivBhajan #ShivTandavStotram  #ShivTandavStotra  #BholenathSong #ShivSong #शिवतांडवस्तोत्र  #BholenathSong #Mahadev #Mahashivratri #OmNamahShivaya #MahashivratriSpecial 

👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Times Music Spiritual - https://bit.ly/spchnl

Label - Times Music Spiritual

Like || Comment || Subscribe || Share

https://www.youtube.com/@timesmusicspiritual

Audio Credits:-
Title - Shiv Tandav Stotram
Singer - Shankar Mahadevan
Composer - Uma Mohan, Shailesh Dani
Lyrics - Traditional
Language - Sanskrit

Video Credits:-
Production house : Dancing Elephant Films
Concept & Direction by : Kapil Sharma 
Ai Filmmaker & Creative : Sumit Agrawal
Dancing Elephant Films Team: Sonam Thukral & Sam Singh 
Editor : Sumit Agrawal


Shiv Tandav Stotram Lyrics in English:

Jatatavigalajjala pravahapavitasthale

Galeavalambya lambitam bhujangatungamalikam

Damad damad damaddama ninadavadamarvayam

Chakara chandtandavam tanotu nah shivah shivam

ata kata hasambhrama bhramanilimpanirjhari

Vilolavichivalarai virajamanamurdhani

Dhagadhagadhagajjva lalalata pattapavake

Kishora chandrashekhare ratih pratikshanam mama

Dharadharendrana ndinivilasabandhubandhura

Sphuradigantasantati pramodamanamanase

Krupakatakshadhorani nirudhadurdharapadi

Kvachidigambare manovinodametuvastuni

Jata bhujan gapingala sphuratphanamaniprabha

Kadambakunkuma dravapralipta digvadhumukhe

Madandha sindhu rasphuratvagutariyamedure

Mano vinodamadbhutam bibhartu bhutabhartari

Sahasra lochana prabhritya sheshalekhashekhara

Prasuna dhulidhorani vidhusaranghripithabhuh

Bhujangaraja malaya nibaddhajatajutaka

Shriyai chiraya jayatam chakora bandhushekharah

Lalata chatvarajvaladhanajnjayasphulingabha

nipitapajnchasayakam namannilimpanayakam

Sudha mayukha lekhaya virajamanashekharam

Maha kapali sampade shirojatalamastunah

Karala bhala pattikadhagaddhagaddhagajjvala

Ddhanajnjaya hutikruta prachandapajnchasayake

Dharadharendra nandini kuchagrachitrapatraka

Prakalpanaikashilpini trilochane ratirmama

navina megha mandali niruddhadurdharasphurat

Kuhu nishithinitamah prabandhabaddhakandharah

nilimpanirjhari dharastanotu krutti sindhurah

Kalanidhanabandhurah shriyam jagaddhurandharah

Praphulla nila pankaja prapajnchakalimchatha

Vdambi kanthakandali raruchi prabaddhakandharam

Smarachchidam purachchhidam bhavachchidam makhachchidam

Gajachchidandhakachidam tamamtakachchidam bhaje

Akharvagarvasarvamangala kalakadambamajnjari

Rasapravaha madhuri vijrumbhana madhuvratam

Smarantakam purantakam bhavantakam makhantakam

Gajantakandhakantakam tamantakantakam bhaje

Jayatvadabhravibhrama bhramadbhujangamasafur

Dhigdhigdhi nirgamatkarala bhaal havyavat

Dhimiddhimiddhimidhva nanmrudangatungamangala

Dhvanikramapravartita prachanda tandavah shivah

Drushadvichitratalpayor bhujanga mauktikasrajor

Garishtharatnaloshthayoh suhrudvipakshapakshayoh

Trushnaravindachakshushoh prajamahimahendrayoh

Sama pravartayanmanah kada sadashivam bhaje

Kada nilimpanirjhari nikujnjakotare vasanh

Vimuktadurmatih sada shirah sthamajnjalim vahanh

Vimuktalolalochano lalamabhalalagnakah

Shiveti mantramuchcharan sada sukhi bhavamyaham

Imam hi nityameva muktamuttamottamam stavam

Pathansmaran bruvannaro vishuddhimeti santatam

Hare gurau subhaktimashu yati nanyatha gatim

Vimohanam hi dehinam sushankarasya chintanam

Shiv Tandav Stotram Lyrics in English:

Jatatavigalajjala pravahapavitasthale

Galeavalambya lambitam bhujangatungamalikam

Damad damad damaddama ninadavadamarvayam

Chakara chandtandavam tanotu nah shivah shivam

ata kata hasambhrama bhramanilimpanirjhari

Vilolavichivalarai virajamanamurdhani

Dhagadhagadhagajjva lalalata pattapavake

Kishora chandrashekhare ratih pratikshanam mama

Dharadharendrana ndinivilasabandhubandhura

Sphuradigantasantati pramodamanamanase

Krupakatakshadhorani nirudhadurdharapadi

Kvachidigambare manovinodametuvastuni

Jata bhujan gapingala sphuratphanamaniprabha

Kadambakunkuma dravapralipta digvadhumukhe

Madandha sindhu rasphuratvagutariyamedure

Mano vinodamadbhutam bibhartu bhutabhartari

Sahasra lochana prabhritya sheshalekhashekhara

Prasuna dhulidhorani vidhusaranghripithabhuh

Bhujangaraja malaya nibaddhajatajutaka

Shriyai chiraya jayatam chakora bandhushekharah

Lalata chatvarajvaladhanajnjayasphulingabha

nipitapajnchasayakam namannilimpanayakam

Sudha mayukha lekhaya virajamanashekharam

Maha kapali sampade shirojatalamastunah

Karala bhala pattikadhagaddhagaddhagajjvala

Ddhanajnjaya hutikruta prachandapajnchasayake

Dharadharendra nandini kuchagrachitrapatraka

Prakalpanaikashilpini trilochane ratirmama

navina megha mandali niruddhadurdharasphurat

Kuhu nishithinitamah prabandhabaddhakandharah

nilimpanirjhari dharastanotu krutti sindhurah

Kalanidhanabandhurah shriyam jagaddhurandharah

Praphulla nila pankaja prapajnchakalimchatha

Vdambi kanthakandali raruchi prabaddhakandharam

Smarachchidam purachchhidam bhavachchidam makhachchidam

Gajachchidandhakachidam tamamtakachchidam bhaje

Akharvagarvasarvamangala kalakadambamajnjari

Rasapravaha madhuri vijrumbhana madhuvratam

Smarantakam purantakam bhavantakam makhantakam

Gajantakandhakantakam tamantakantakam bhaje

Jayatvadabhravibhrama bhramadbhujangamasafur

Dhigdhigdhi nirgamatkarala bhaal havyavat

Dhimiddhimiddhimidhva nanmrudangatungamangala

Dhvanikramapravartita prachanda tandavah shivah

Drushadvichitratalpayor bhujanga mauktikasrajor

Garishtharatnaloshthayoh suhrudvipakshapakshayoh

Trushnaravindachakshushoh prajamahimahendrayoh

Sama pravartayanmanah kada sadashivam bhaje

Kada nilimpanirjhari nikujnjakotare vasanh

Vimuktadurmatih sada shirah sthamajnjalim vahanh

Vimuktalolalochano lalamabhalalagnakah

Shiveti mantramuchcharan sada sukhi bhavamyaham

Imam hi nityameva muktamuttamottamam stavam

Pathansmaran bruvannaro vishuddhimeti santatam

Hare gurau subhaktimashu yati nanyatha gatim

Vimohanam hi dehinam sushankarasya chintanam

en.title: Shiv Tandav Stotram | Shankar Mahadevan | रावण रचित शिव तांडव स्तोत्र | Mahashivratri Special 2026
en.description:
Times Music Spiritual presents ‘Shiv Tandav Stotram’, a powerful and sacred Shiv song traditionally written by Ravana, & sung by Shankar Mahadevan. This Shiv tandav composition praises the strength of Lord Shiva. With powerful Sanskrit verses & Shankar Mahadevan’s dynamic vocals, the Shiv stotram captures the intensity of Shiva’s Tandav - the celestial dance of creation & destruction.

According to legend, Ravana, the great devotee of Lord Shiva, composed the Shiv Tandav Stotram to praise Mahadev after trying to lift Mount Kailash. Impressed by his devotion and dedication, Lord Shiva blessed him with immense power and wisdom.

The importance of Shiv Tandav Stotram lies in its spiritual vibrations & powerful meaning. Chanting or listening to it is believed to remove fear, negative energy, and obstacles while bringing confidence, mental strength, and inner stability. It energizes the mind, improves focus, and fills devotees with courage. Check out the song now & immerse yourself in the divine energy of Bholenath. Har Har Mahadev! 🔱
